primaryObjective: Cost follows model work, even when a product wraps usage as seats, credits, or subscriptions.

requiredOnScreenText: The same work can wear different price labels
shots.visualFocus: billing metaphor with shared work packet and concept rail
acceptance: Frame is nonblank and uses the active concept accent.
Headline and three term chips are visible.
Shared work packet appears before the bottom concept rail.
The scene can be understood without voiceover.
